nodes.label: Tests for the computer_use toolset (cua-driver backend, universal schema).
Tear down the cached backend between tests.
Return the active noop backend instance so tests can inspect calls.
Schema description must agree with the runtime. The original PR         text sai

drag action must dispatch to backend.drag with coordinates (issue #24170, bug 4)
drag action must dispatch to backend.drag with element indices (issue #24170, bu
drag without from/to must return an error.
set_value must reach the backend — regression for missing _NoopBackend stub.
capture_after must not fire when res.ok=False (regression guard).          A fol
capture_after must trigger for successful actions.
Inject a fake backend that returns a PNG to exercise the envelope path.
Construct a fake backend that yields ``count`` AX elements.
Regression for #22865: an Electron-style 600-element AX tree must         not em
Backwards-compat: small captures keep the full elements array and         do not
Malformed `max_elements` (string, negative, zero) must not silently         disa
A caller passing a very large `max_elements` must not be able to         disable
When `max_elements` is below the human-summary's own line cap, the         summa
The som/vision multimodal envelope returns a screenshot, not an         `element
Image blocks in old tool_results get replaced with placeholders.
The schema must be round-trippable as a standard OpenAI tool definition.
Anthropic-only gating was a #4562 artefact — must not recur.
Bug 5: element labels stripped in capture results (cua-driver v0.1.6 format).
Gracefully handles trees that mix old and new line formats.
Bug 2: capture_after=True loses app context after actions.      _maybe_follow_ca
capture_after=True should pass _last_app to the follow-up capture.
When no app context is set, follow-up capture uses app=None (frontmost).

When no app= is given, capture continues to pick the frontmost         window —
focus_app(app=X) must return ok=False when X matches nothing —     not silently
